audio_description: The audio features a single, intense scream with a high-pitched, strained quality, conveying a sense of extreme distress or fear.
temporal_description: A pale, bald figure in dark robes is seen in a dim, rocky environment, initially raising an arm and later moving toward the ground. The scene shifts to show two figures standing on a rocky outcrop, facing a glowing, swirling magical portal. A large group of similarly dressed individuals stands in formation below, observing the two figures. One of the figures on the outcrop casts a bright beam of light downward. A close-up of an older woman in dark clothing is shown, her face partially illuminated.
